Israel, Lebanon extend ceasefire as Trump says ‘great chance’ for peace deal
items.description: Israel and Lebanon extended their ceasefire by three weeks on Thursday following a meeting of officials from both sides at the White House. US President Donald Trump said he believed there was a "great chance" the two countries would agree on a peace deal, even though Israel and Hezbollah have accused each other of mul…

items.title: Ukrainian married couple aged 75 killed in Russian attack on Odesa
items.description: Ukrainian officials say residential buildings and bulk carrier also hit in overnight assault.

items.title: Ceasefire extended: What's next in the Iran war?
items.description: With no fixed ceasefire deadline for now, the US and Iran are looking for ways to safeguard their own interests. DW takes a look at the main sticking points and explains some key issues.

items.title: Zelenskyy Says Ukraine's War Position 'Most Stable' In Months As EU Approves Funds
items.description: The European Union formally approved a major, long-debated loan to Ukraine and a new sanctions package against Russia, as President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Kyiv was at its "most stable" shape on the battlefield in months.

items.title: EU contemplates using 'blocking statute' in response to Trump sanctions against ICC
items.description: Since the 2025 executive order signed by Donald Trump targeting the International Criminal Court, calls have mounted for the European Commission to activate a law that would soften the impact of US sanctions.

items.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
items.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

items.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of targeting journalist killed in air strike
items.description: Lebanon's prime minister accused Israel of war crimes after IDF attacks on Red Cross vehicles also stopped rescuers from reaching the site.

items.title: SECURITY COUNCIL LIVE: Regional war threatens Syria’s fragile transition

items.title: Woman and Child Killed in Ukrainian Drone Strike on Samara Region
items.description: Ukraine previously attacked an oil refinery in the city of Syzran, where a woman and a child were killed early Wednesday.

items.title: EXCLUSIVE: Are Robots Replacing Soldiers in Ukraine War? What’s Really Happening on the Front Line
items.description: Ukrainian troops say ground robots are rapidly expanding on the front line to deliver supplies and evacuate wounded, reducing risks for soldiers but not replacing them.
